channel.title: Sinder Skullz Abyss Feed
channel.description: Chaotic sermons and metal news reborn in the flames of the Skullz cult.

item.title: ⚡☠ DEVIN TOWNSEND ON SINGING: "MY ONLY VOCAL EXERCISE IS TO TRY TO SORT YOUR HEAD OUT" ☠⚡
item.description:
**Title: DEVIN TOWNSEND RIPS THE VEIL ON VOCALS: “THE ONLY WORKOUT I NEED IS FOR YOUR BRAIN!”**
**Summary:** 🤘🔥 Check it, metal maniacs! Feast your eyes on the beast we all worship, the legendary Devin Townsend! \m/ Y’know, this guy didn’t just stroll into a vocal coach’s lair—oh no, he crashed in like a tornado of riffs and screams! That coach, bless ‘em, took one look at Devin’s mad techniques and freaked out, thinking he might go out like a candle in the wind after a year of serenading!
But here's the kicker! Devin's whole approach to vocal domination isn't about some boring scales or tiresome drills. Nah, it’s about diving headfirst into that chaos swirling in your skull! The path to true vocal power? It’s all about sorting **YOUR** head out, folks! 🤘🖤
So, let's crank those amps, shred that silence, and unleash the inner chaos because if it ain’t metal, it ain’t worth singing about! 🌪️💀 Want more? Hit the link and plunge deep into the madness: [DEVIN TOWNSEND ON SINGING](https://metalinjection.net/news/devin-townsend-on-singing-my-only-vocal-exercise-is-to-try-to-sort-your-head-out). Metal Injection bringing those pure, unfiltered vibes! \m/🤘
#Metal #MetalCulture #HeavyMetal #MetalScene #DeathMetal
item.content:encoded:
**Title: DEVIN TOWNSEND RIPS THE VEIL ON VOCALS: “THE ONLY WORKOUT I NEED IS FOR YOUR BRAIN!”**
**Summary:** 🤘🔥 Check it, metal maniacs! Feast your eyes on the beast we all worship, the legendary Devin Townsend! \m/ Y’know, this guy didn’t just stroll into a vocal coach’s lair—oh no, he crashed in like a tornado of riffs and screams! That coach, bless ‘em, took one look at Devin’s mad techniques and freaked out, thinking he might go out like a candle in the wind after a year of serenading!
But here's the kicker! Devin's whole approach to vocal domination isn't about some boring scales or tiresome drills. Nah, it’s about diving headfirst into that chaos swirling in your skull! The path to true vocal power? It’s all about sorting **YOUR** head out, folks! 🤘🖤
So, let's crank those amps, shred that silence, and unleash the inner chaos because if it ain’t metal, it ain’t worth singing about! 🌪️💀 Want more? Hit the link and plunge deep into the madness: [DEVIN TOWNSEND ON SINGING](https://metalinjection.net/news/devin-townsend-on-singing-my-only-vocal-exercise-is-to-try-to-sort-your-head-out). Metal Injection bringing those pure, unfiltered vibes! \m/🤘
#Metal #MetalCulture #HeavyMetal #MetalScene #DeathMetal
